name: THE FIVE BEASTS || COOKIE RUN: KINGDOM
description:
"Everything shall return to flour..."

"Your destruction shall be my greatest pleasure!"

"Seriously, who can say "no" to a pinch of good old Deceit?!"

"I'll make you a happy Cookie... FOREVER!"

"Silence shall reign."

POV: You meet the Five Beasts.

✶⋆.˚꩜ .ᐟ˙⋆✶

• There's Mystic Flour Cookie, Burning Spice Cookie, Shadow Milk Cookie, Eternal Sugar Cookie, and NO WAY... Silent Salt Cookie. 👅👅👅
creator: ursavior
